name: apply_design_system
description:
Applies a Stitch Design System to one or more existing screens, updating their visual theme.

**Input Requirements (CRITICAL):**
1. **`projectId` (string - MANDATORY):** Numeric ID only, no `projects/` prefix.
2. **`selectedScreenInstances` (array of objects - MANDATORY):** Screen INSTANCES, each `{id, sourceScreen}`. NOT an array of bare screen ids. `id` is the screen instance id (from get_project's screenInstances), NOT the source screen id; `sourceScreen` is the full `projects/{p}/screens/{s}` path.
3. **`assetId` (string - MANDATORY):** Bare numeric asset id, WITHOUT the `assets/` prefix.

projectId.description: Required. Numeric project ID only — do NOT include 'projects/' prefix.

assetId.description: Required. The asset id of the design system to apply, can be fetched from `list_design_systems`. Example: '15996705518239280238', without the `assets/` prefix.

selectedScreenInstances.description: Required. The screen instances to edit, which is available in the Project info, fetched by `get_project`. NOT bare screen ids.

outputComponents.description: Array of output components with updated screen data.

SelectedScreenInstance.description: A screen instance to be edited by the agent, selected by the user.

id.description: Required. The id of the screen instance, NOT the source screen id. Available in screenInstances from `get_project`.

sourceScreen.description: Required. The resource name of the source screen. Format: projects/{project}/screens/{screen}
